seoTitle: Lake Gilles vs Lake Plains — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lake Gilles and Lake Plains. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lake Gilles vs Lake Plains: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Gilles and Lake Plains.
heading: Lake Gilles vs Lake Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Gilles, South Australia and Lake Plains, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Gilles has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Lake Plains (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Gilles or Lake Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Gilles has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Lake Plains scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Gilles scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Plains scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Gilles or Lake Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Gilles has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
